w:r.w:t: BIO NPK- Microbial NPK Growth Activator
(Triple-action microbial consortium for N, P & K availability)
What it is & How it works
Each microorganism plays a specific role:
converts insoluble phosphorus into plant-available form
Together, they enhance root development, nutrient uptake efficiency and overall crop performance.
, leading to stronger plant establishment and higher yield
crop growth, yield and produce quality
Supports sustainable nutrition by reducing dependence on chemical fertilizers
Complete biological NPK nutrition through live microbial activity
Shade dry and sow on the
10 ml SUN BIO NPK in 1 litre water
Apply through drip system directly in root zone
NPK are the primary macronutrients responsible for overall plant growth, root strength, flowering, fruiting, and yield.
Chemical fertilizers get fixed in soil (especially P & K)
Even when fertilizers are applied, nutrients may remain unavailable to plants.
How Soil+ BIO NPK Fixes It
Phosphate Solubilizing Bacteria (PSB) – Converts locked phosphorus into available form
Potash Mobilizing Bacteria (KMB) – Mobilizes unavailable potassium
Ideal for cereals, millets, fruits, vegetables, sugarcane, plantation crops, and field crops.
FE-Mob- Iron Chlorophyll Support Bio Fertilizer
(Microbial nature and count based on official product info)
What it is & How it works
formulated with ferrous (iron) mobilizing bacteria that convert unavailable iron forms in the soil into
. This supports iron uptake for plants, aiding
protein synthesis, chlorophyll formation, enzyme activities, respiration and photosynthesis
chlorophyll synthesis and dark green foliage
beneficial soil microbe population and soil health
that enhances plant iron nutrition through microbial activity rather than chemical iron application.
50–100 kg well decomposed manure or cake
Yellowing of young leaves (interveinal chlorosis – veins remain green)
chlorophyll synthesis, respiration, and enzyme activation
High soil pH (alkaline soils lock iron)
Even when iron is present in soil, it is often
Converts unavailable iron into plant-available form
Restores leaf greenness and plant vitality
Improves crop yield and overall health
ZN-Mob- Zinc Nutrient Activation Bio Fertilizer
(Biological agent that converts insoluble soil zinc into plant-available zinc)
What it is & How it works

formulated with zinc-solubilizing bacteria that stay active in the root zone. These microbes produce organic acids that break down insoluble zinc compounds (such as zinc sulphides, zinc oxide and zinc carbonate) into
. This improves zinc uptake without relying on chemical zinc fertilizers.
in soil and root zone for better uptake.
and provides residual benefits to subsequent crops.
soil microbial population and overall soil health
Biological zinc mobilizer that converts fixed soil zinc into plant-available form through microbial activity.
for zinc correction from day one.
well decomposed manure/cake and apply evenly on moist soil.
of water and apply near root zone.
in sufficient water and apply in root zone through drip system.
Yellowing between veins on young leaves
Delayed flowering and poor fruit set
Zinc plays a key role in
enzyme activation, hormone regulation (auxins), and growth development
High soil pH (alkaline soils reduce zinc availability)
In many soils, zinc is present but remains
Converts insoluble zinc into plant-available form
Enhances root growth and plant vigor
Supports enzyme activity and overall metabolism
Improves yield and crop quality naturally
What it is & How it works

bacteria that colonize the plant root zone and fix atmospheric nitrogen into a plant-available form. The bacteria remain active in soil, support root development, and improve nutrient availability throughout the crop cycle.
Reduces chemical nitrogen fertilizer requirement by up to 30%
Improves root growth and overall plant vigour
Enhances soil microbial activity and soil fertility
Supports higher yield and better crop quality
N-Azos is primarily used as a
biological nitrogen fixer that naturally enriches the soil, enhancing plant growth and reducing dependency on chemical nitrogen fertilizers
of vegetables, pulses, cereals, and other crops.
increase yield without increasing chemical fertilizer use
Vegetables, fruits, cereals, pulses, oilseeds, flowers, sugarcane, plantation crops.
in cold jaggery water, coat seeds uniformly, shade-dry, and sow the same day.
with well-decomposed compost/FYM and apply evenly on moist soil.
and apply near the root zone.
Low yield and poor crop quality
Nitrogen deficiency usually happens due to:
How SUN BIO AZOS fixes it
What it is & How it works

bacteria that convert atmospheric nitrogen into forms plants can absorb. These bacteria also produce biologically active growth-promoting substances that support nutrient availability and plant development.
Reduces chemical nitrogen fertilizer use by up to 25%
Improves soil texture, structure, and microbial activity
Enhances seed germination and plant growth
Can indirectly support crop yield increase through growth promoters
Sun Bio Azo is primarily used as a
biological nitrogen fixer that enhances soil fertility naturally, supports early plant growth, and reduces the need for chemical nitrogen fertilizers
of crops like cereals, pulses, and vegetables.
boost yield while lowering chemical fertilizer use
Cereals, millets, fruits, vegetables, flowers, plantation and field crops.
in cold jaggery solution, coat seeds evenly, shade-dry, and sow the same day.
with 50–100 kg well-decomposed manure/cake and apply evenly on moist soil.
and apply near the root zone.
in water and apply through drip irrigation.
Same base causes as before, but here’s
Overuse of urea (short-term boost, long-term damage)
How SUN BIO AZO fixes it
Lives freely in soil (not attached to roots)
Converts atmospheric nitrogen → ammonium form usable by plants
What it is & How it works

N-Acteo contains symbiotic nitrogen-fixing aerobic bacteria (Acetobacter / Gluconacetobacter) that can fix atmospheric nitrogen in the plant root, stem, and leaf tissues — especially in sugarcane. These bacteria also help solubilize phosphorus and produce plant-growth-promoting substances.
Fixes up to ~80% of nitrogen requirement in crops like sugarcane
Acts like “black urea,” enhancing nitrogen supply naturally
Solubilizes insoluble phosphorus to improve nutrient availability
Promotes growth and can increase cane yield by up to
Supports higher sugar recovery (≈ +0.5%) in sugarcane
N-Acteo is primarily used as a
liquid bio-fertilizer that enhances soil microbial activity, improves nutrient availability, and promotes vigorous plant growth
to improve microbial activity and nutrient cycling.
of vegetables, fruits, and field crops.
enhance soil fertility and crop vigor naturally
before planting. Do not store treated setts for more than an hour.
and apply within 3 months of planting.
in water, filter, and apply through drip irrigation.
High sugar crops → need internal nitrogen supply
How SUN BIO ACTEO fixes it
What it is & How it works

bacteria that form a symbiotic relationship with legume roots, creating infection threads and nodules that fix atmospheric nitrogen into plant-usable form, enhancing nutrient supply during the crop cycle.
Increases nitrogen fixation by about 40–50 kg/ha
Reduces chemical fertilizer use by up to
Enhances seed germination, plant vigour, and plant stand
Improves soil fertility through better nutrient cycling
N-Rhizo is primarily used as a
bio-fertilizer that promotes healthy root development by colonizing the rhizosphere with beneficial microorganisms, enhancing nutrient uptake and soil health
soils with poor root growth or compaction
to establish a strong root system.
improve nutrient absorption and plant vigor naturally
all vegetables, cereals, pulses, and plantation crops
Groundnut, black gram, green gram, red gram, cowpea, Bengal gram, mustard, soybean, French bean, cluster bean, lab-lab, sesbania and other legume crops.
of N-Rhizo in cold jaggery solution and coat seeds uniformly; shade-dry and sow the same day.
well-decomposed compost or cake and apply evenly on moist soil.
and apply near the root zone.
in water and apply via drip irrigation.
Main cause: Lack of Rhizobium bacteria
How SUN BIO RHIZO fixes it
What it is & How it works

K-Mob contains beneficial potash-mobilizing bacteria that solubilize bound potassium in soil by secreting organic acids and enzymes, making potash readily available in the root zone for plant uptake. Potash is a key nutrient throughout the plant life cycle, especially during fruit set and development.
Makes soil-bound potassium available to plants
Improves early root growth and plant development
Supports better produce quality and drought tolerance
Promotes root hair development and stronger plants
K-Mob is primarily used as a
microbial bio-fertilizer that mobilizes potassium in the soil, ensuring better nutrient availability and supporting strong stem, fruit, and flower development
of vegetables, fruits, and plantation crops.
enhance crop yield, quality, and stress resistance naturally
all crops needing stronger stems, fruits, and flowers
Cereals, millets, pulses, oilseeds, fiber crops, sugar crops, forage crops, plantation crops, vegetables, fruits, spices, flowers, medicinal and aromatic crops, orchards, ornamentals.
of K-Mob in cold jaggery solution and coat seeds evenly; shade-dry and use on the same day.
of well-decomposed manure/cake and apply evenly on moist soil.
and apply near the root zone.
in water and apply in the root zone through drip irrigation.
Yellowing and scorching on leaf edges
Potassium is essential for water regulation, enzyme activation, fruit development, and stress resistance.
Potassium present in soil but locked in mineral form
Sandy soils prone to potassium leaching
High cropping intensity depletes available potassium
Low organic matter and microbial activity
In many soils, potassium exists but remains non-available to plant roots.
Converts insoluble potassium into plant-available form
Enhances fruit size, color, and weight
Improves plant strength and stem thickness
Boosts resistance against stress and diseases
Improves yield and crop quality naturally
Total Viable Propagules: Min. 60 Spores / g
What it is & How it works

Myco-V contains mycorrhizal fungal spores and infected root fragments that form a symbiotic association with plant roots. This association enhances phosphorus absorption, improves water and nutrient uptake, and can offer protection against certain soil pathogens.
Increases phosphorus uptake and mobilization in all crops
Enhances overall water and nutrient absorption
Improves root system access to nutrients
Boosts tolerance to soil stress conditions
Myco-V is primarily used as a
bio-fertilizer containing arbuscular mycorrhizal fungi that colonize plant roots, enhancing nutrient and water absorption while improving soil health
to improve nutrient and water uptake.
to establish a strong root-mycorrhizal network.
enhance crop resilience, growth, and yield naturally
vegetables, fruits, cereals, pulses, and plantation crops
that benefit from improved root symbiosis.
Cereals, millets, pulses, oilseeds, fruits, vegetables, plantation crops, fiber crops, spices, aromatic crops, sugar crops, etc.
of Myco-V in cold jaggery solution and coat seeds evenly. Shade-dry and use on the same day.
of well-decomposed manure or cake and apply to the field.
Powder / Solid carrier (implied from product description of spores & gram measurement)
Also improves: Micronutrients (Zn, Fe, Cu) + Water uptake
How SUN BIO VAM fixes it
Core Mechanism: Root Extension via Fungi
Not adding P — unlocking existing P
What it is & How it works

P-Sob contains beneficial phosphate-solubilising bacteria (Phosphobacteria) that solubilize fixed phosphorus in soil into plant-available forms through organic acid production. This improves phosphorus nutrition and supports plant growth.
Increases available phosphorus in soil by ~30–40%
Supports strong root formation and plant growth
Improves soil quality and nutrient availability
P-Sob is primarily used as a
bio-fertilizer that solubilizes soil phosphorus, making it readily available to plants and promoting strong root development and flowering
early growth and root development stages
boost flowering, fruiting, and overall crop yield naturally
vegetables, fruits, cereals, pulses, and plantation crops
Cereals, millets, fruits, vegetables, flowers, plantation and field crops.
in cold jaggery solution, coat seeds evenly, shade-dry, and sow the same day.
with 50–100 kg well-decomposed manure/cake and apply evenly on moist soil.
and apply near the root zone by drenching.
in water and apply in the root zone through drip irrigation.

Core Mechanism: Phosphate Solubilization via Fungi
(CFU: Rhizobium or Azotobacter or Azospirillum: 1 X 10
What it is & How it works
Compost Active is a consortium of aerobic microorganisms (including

such as press mud, spent wash, cow dung, poultry manure, coir pith, bagasse, and other agricultural residues. It helps break down complex organic matter into stable compost more quickly by increasing microbial activity and temperature during composting.
Accelerates organic decomposition, reaching a balanced C:N ratio within
Eliminates pathogens, pests, and weed seeds through high-temperature action.
Produces natural growth stimulants beneficial for plant growth.
Minimizes odour and maintains hygienic conditions in composting sites.
Compost Active is primarily used as a
bio-fertilizer that combines multiple beneficial microbes to enhance nutrient availability, improve soil health, and support balanced crop growth
soils with low microbial activity or nutrient deficiencies
to establish beneficial microbes in the rhizosphere.
improve crop vigor, yield, and soil fertility naturally
vegetables, fruits, cereals, pulses, and plantation crops
The decomposed compost produced using Sun Bio Compact can be used for
of organic matter and keep overnight.
Make windrows or heaps (~1 m height).
Maintain moisture periodically and cover with perforated cloth or sheet.
Leave undisturbed until mature compost is ready (heap cools and reduces to ~25% of original size).
of Sun Bio Compact in water and apply near the root zone through drip irrigation to help soil organic matter decomposition.
Soil Revive- Humic Fulvic Root Booster
What it is & How it works
Soil Revive is a natural combination of
based on humic and fulvic acids. It improves soil structure, boosts nutrient availability around the root zone, and supports stronger root, leaf, flower, and fruit development.
higher humic acid content (≈75%) plus fulvic acid (≈15%)
, which enhances nutrient chelation, water retention, and uptake compared with the standard root booster.
Soil Revive adds fulvic action for stronger overall nutrient mobilization and plant response.
Improves soil structure, water-holding capacity, and fertilizer retention
Stimulates active white root formation and growth
Enhances fertilizer efficiency by reducing nutrient leaching
Promotes nutrient uptake and chelation around roots
Improves soil environment for beneficial micro-organisms
Soil Revive is primarily used as a
value-added bio-fertilizer that enhances root growth with beneficial microbes while providing additional nutrients for stronger and healthier plant development
soils with weak root systems or low fertility
improve nutrient uptake, plant vigor, and overall crop performance
vegetables, fruits, cereals, pulses, and plantation crops
requiring enhanced root and nutrient support.
Fruits, vegetables, flowers, and food crops. (
Soil Revive can be used in multiple ways:
with chemical fertilizer or organic manure and apply in soil.
in water and apply in the root zone through drip irrigation.

Causes of this deficiency (THIS IS GOLD)
Main cause: Poor soil structure + low CEC

How BIO ROOT PLUS fixes it
Very important for long-term soil health
What it is & How it works
natural mixture of essential amino acids (80

required by crop plants to support protein synthesis, improve nutrient absorption, and strengthen plant metabolism. It acts as a chelating and binding agent in soil, helping nutrients and trace minerals become more available to plants, while also supporting beneficial microbes and overall plant health.
Acts as a chelate & binding agent to improve nutrient availability
Supports plant defence and stress resilience (transplant, insects, pathogens, temperature, drought)
Enhances overall plant growth and microbial activity in soil
Improves quality, colour development, and shelf life of fruits & vegetables
Amino 80 is primarily used as a
microbial bio-fertilizer that accelerates plant growth by enhancing nutrient availability, soil microbial activity, and overall crop vigor
soils with low fertility or microbial activity
increase crop yield, quality, and resilience
vegetables, fruits, cereals, pulses, and plantation crops
All crops (field crops, vegetables, fruits, flowers, plantation crops).

and apply near the root zone.
and spray on foliage in the morning or evening.

Ready-made building blocks for protein synthesis
What it is & How it works

that improves plant structural strength, enhances nutrient transport, and boosts immunity against biotic and abiotic stresses. It strengthens cell walls, increases photosynthesis, and supports overall plant health by improving nutrient availability and metabolic processes.
Strengthens leaves and improves resistance to sucking pests and diseases
Enhances photosynthesis, reproductive processes, and pollen fertility
Improves ripening, fruit quality, flexibility of branches, and shelf life
Increases nutrient availability and interaction with applied macro & trace elements
Boosts plant tolerance to biotic and abiotic stresses
Sil-98 is primarily used as a
bio-fertilizer that supplies essential nutrients along with beneficial microbes, improving soil fertility, plant nutrition, and overall crop performance
improve yield, crop quality, and soil health simultaneously
vegetables, fruits, cereals, pulses, and plantation crops

How SUN BIO FERTISIL fixes it
Crop Growth Promoter & Soil Conditioner (Soil Enriching Granules)
What it is & How it works

made from naturally occurring soil and plant health boosters. It improves soil structure, enhances nutrient uptake by roots, and supports beneficial soil microorganisms, resulting in healthier plant growth and improved yield quality.
Improves soil condition and plant growth overall
Enhances nutrient uptake by roots for stronger plants
Boosts beneficial microbial activity in soil
Reduces flower/fruit drop and increases fruit set
Improves colour, taste, weight, quality & yield of produce
Field Boost is primarily used as a
bio-organic fertilizer that enhances soil fertility, supplies essential nutrients, and promotes vigorous crop growth for higher yield and quality
soils with low organic matter or nutrient deficiencies
to boost plant establishment and growth.

directly in the soil mixed with organic or inorganic fertilizers and irrigate immediately after application.

Plant Growth Promoter (Australian Seaweed Extract – Durvillaea potatorum)
What it is & How it works
100% organic seaweed extract from Durvillaea potatorum

(Tasmania, Australia) containing phenolic compounds, cytokines, and organically chelated potassium. It improves plant resistance to stress, supports root development, enhances foliar absorption, and boosts beneficial rhizosphere activity by promoting sugar secretion from roots.
Reduces nutrient leaching and improves nutrient efficiency
Promotes deeper root development and stronger plants
Enhances flowering, fruit set, fruit quality, and leaf colour
Increases resistance to frost, drought, pests, and fungal stress
Stimulates beneficial soil bacteria and worm activity
Sea Fresh is primarily used as a
seaweed-based bio-fertilizer that improves plant growth, enhances stress tolerance, and boosts nutrient uptake through natural growth stimulants
, especially during vegetative and pre-flowering phases.
enhance yield, quality, and stress resilience naturally
vegetables, fruits, cereals, pulses, and plantation crops
needing growth stimulation and improved nutrient absorption.
All crops — cereals, millets, pulses, oilseeds, vegetables, fruits, flowers, and plantation crops.
(General category usage typical for kelp biostimulants; product page implies broad crop utility.)
and drench near the root zone.
per litre of water; spray in the morning or evening.
Can be mixed with organic manures and fertilisers or used directly in fertigation.
Organic Phosphorus & Potash Rich Soil Amendment (Plant-Based P & K Fertiliser)
What it is & How it works

containing phosphorus (P₂O₅) and potassium (K₂O) that are readily available to plants. Unlike chemical P & K fertilisers where most phosphorus gets fixed in the soil, the nutrients in Jai Phos remain available for uptake, supporting healthy root development, flowering, fruiting, and overall plant nutrition while improving soil health.
Slow-release feeding — nutrients available as the plant needs them
Improves flower and fruit production, maturity, and quality
Increases soil microbial activity and overall soil health
P-Bloom is primarily used as a
phosphate-rich bio-fertilizer that makes phosphorus readily available to plants, promoting strong root development, flowering, and fruiting
early growth and root establishment stages
boost flowering, fruiting, and overall crop productivity naturally
vegetables, fruits, cereals, pulses, and plantation crops

Vegetables, fruits, flowers, cereals, pulses, oilseeds, plantation crops, and other field crops where P & K enhancement is needed. (Typical crop usage based on product category and nutrient application practices — not explicitly tabulated on page.)
Granular / Soil nutrient amendment (organic P & K blend)
Purplish discoloration on leaves (especially older leaves)
root development, energy transfer (ATP), flowering, and early crop establishment
Phosphorus gets fixed in soil (especially in high calcium or high iron soils)
Alkaline or highly acidic soil conditions

Converts insoluble phosphorus into plant-available form
Improves yield naturally without excess chemical input

What it is & How it works
derived from fermented byproduct of the vitamin/enzyme industry. It
, enhances physical, chemical, and biological soil properties, and helps buffer soil pH. This improves nutrient availability, boosts fertilizer use efficiency, and supports healthier root systems.
Buffers soil pH to improve nutrient uptake and availability
Enhances microbial activity to improve soil health and nutrient cycling
Increases fertilizer use efficiency and can help reduce fertiliser requirements
Slurry Charge is primarily used as a
liquid organic fertilizer that improves soil health, enhances nutrient uptake, and supports overall crop growth and vigor

What it is & How it works

supplying nitrogen (N) and phosphorus (P) in readily absorbable forms that minimise leaching and evaporation. It supports early root and shoot growth and improves nutrient availability when used alone or alongside chemical fertilisers.
readily available form for longer duration

What it is & How it works
prepared from animal and plant origin ingredients. It supplies
in natural, slow-releasing forms that improve soil physical, chemical, and biological properties over time, supporting healthy crop growth at all stages.
Enhances soil texture, aeration, and water-holding capacity
Boosts beneficial microbial activity in soil
Improves soil fertility and plant growth, flowering, fruit set & yield
Organic NPK (5:10:5) is primarily used as a
balanced NPK bio-fertilizer that supplies nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium in an optimized ratio to enhance plant growth, flowering, and fruiting
soils deficient in N, P, or K
boost crop yield, quality, and overall productivity naturally

at the time of sowing or planting.

Promotes flowering and early crop establishment

Protein-Rich Organic Manure (High Organic Carbon Fertiliser)
What it is & How it works

produced from the solvent-extracted residues of non-edible seeds (such as castor and Pongamia). It contains high organic carbon along with N, P, K, and essential secondary and micronutrients, making nutrients readily available for plant uptake while improving soil properties and crop development.
Because the product has many benefits, we expand the list beyond 5 where necessary, but keep them concise and relevant.
— solvent extraction removes oil, boosting N, P & K concentration.
— supplies NPK plus secondary & micronutrients like Ca, Mg, S, Zn, Cu, B, Fe.
Improves soil physical properties & moisture retention
, aiding aeration in clay soils and moisture in sandy soils.
— stimulates roots, flowering, fruiting, chlorophyll formation, protein production, and sugar/starch synthesis.
— activates enzymes, carbon assimilation, nitrogen metabolism, and photosynthesis.
— suppresses harmful insects (e.g., termites) and nematodes in root zones.
— mitigates adverse effects of heavy chemical N/P use over time.
Nitro+ is primarily used as a
high-nitrogen organic fertilizer that rapidly supplies nitrogen to crops, promoting vigorous vegetative growth and lush green foliage
of cereals, vegetables, and leafy crops.
enhance crop growth, yield, and canopy development naturally
crops that require rapid nitrogen availability
for stronger stems and healthy foliage.
Vegetables, fruits, flowers, cereals, millets, pulses, oilseeds, plantation crops, tuber crops, and all field crops needing organic NPK and soil enrichment.
at the time of sowing or planting.
through soil application to enhance nutrient use efficiency.
Organic manure / press cake powder (high protein & carbon).
Low yield and poor vegetative vigor
leaf growth, chlorophyll formation, protein synthesis, and overall plant vigor
Nitrogen is highly mobile and leaches easily
Even after fertilizer application, nitrogen losses are very common.
How Soil+ High Nitro Fixes It
Nitro+ is ideal for crops needing strong vegetative growth phases such as leafy vegetables, cereals, sugarcane, and field crops.
NPK+- High Strength Organic NPK Booster
What it is & How it works
high-NPK organic manure formulated from nutrient-rich cake material

in organic forms, along with secondary and micronutrients. It improves soil fertility, microbial activity, and crop nutrition while reducing nutrient losses and enhancing nutrient availability over time.
Because this product has numerous beneficial effects stated, the benefits list is expanded beyond 5 while keeping them clear and relevant:
balanced organic NPK (≈5% N, 10% P, 8% K)
to support all stages of crop growth.
by adding organic carbon and essential secondary & micronutrients.

that help protect roots from nematodes and other insects.

balanced organic fertilizer that provides nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium simultaneously, supporting overall crop growth, flowering, and yield enhancement

Cotton Seed Cake- Nitrogen Rich Soil Booster
Organic Slow-Release Fertilizer & Soil Conditioner (Oilcake Manure)
What it is & How it works
residue left after cotton seed oil extraction
that supplies nutrients steadily, improves soil texture, and supports soil biology without burning plants. Its organic matter helps retain moisture and enhances nutrient availability over time.
(Because this product offers several unique effects, benefits are listed comprehensively but kept clear and practical.)
— N, P, K and micronutrients release gradually and stay available longer.
— will not burn leaves and resists nutrient loss via leaching.
— enhances organic carbon and water holding capacity.
— its natural acidity can benefit high pH soils.
Readily available nutrients in warm soils
— early availability supports active crop growth.
— enhances overall soil health for better crop outcome.
Cotton Seed Cake is primarily used as an
organic nitrogen-rich fertilizer that improves soil fertility, stimulates vegetative growth, and enhances overall crop productivity
of cereals, vegetables, pulses, and oilseeds.
enhance soil organic matter and microbial activity naturally
for strong growth and higher yield.
Vegetables, fruits, flowers, cereals, millets, pulses, oilseeds, plantation crops, and field crops where slow-release organic nutrition and soil enrichment are desired.
(Based on typical use of oil-cake manures.)
Cotton Seed Cake and mix into soil at the time of sowing/planting.
with other natural fertilizers or manures for enhanced effect.

Organic Oil-Cake Fertilizer & Soil Conditioner (Mahua Seed Residue)
What it is & How it works
natural residue left after oil extraction from Mahua seeds
true organic manure and soil conditioner
, supplying essential nutrients (NPK and protein), improving soil fertility and structure, and aiding beneficial soil biology. It also contains compounds that can help support plant health.
(Benefits expanded slightly for completeness while keeping them clear and practical.)
Enhances soil fertility and organic matter
as a true organic manure, feeding soil microbes.
(primary, secondary, and micronutrients) for healthy plant growth.
and organic carbon, aiding soil structure.
Supports plant health and soil immunity,
to improve nutrient use efficiency and reduce losses due to leaching.
Improves physical, chemical, and biological soil properties
over time for long-term soil health.
Mahua Seed Cake is primarily used as an
organic fertilizer rich in nitrogen and other nutrients that improves soil fertility, promotes healthy vegetative growth, and supports overall crop development
of cereals, pulses, vegetables, and oilseeds.
improve soil organic matter and microbial activity naturally
Vegetables, fruits, flowers, cereals, millets, pulses, oilseeds, and plantation crops where slow-release organic NPK and soil enrichment are desired.
(Typical category based on organic oil-cake use.)
Mahua Seed Cake and mix into soil at the time of sowing/planting.
with other organic fertilizers or manures for enhanced effect.
Organic oil-cake manure (powder / granular organic amendment)
Groundnut DOC- Slow Release Nitrogen Manure
Organic Groundnut Cake Fertilizer & Soil Conditioner (Groundnut DOC)
What it is & How it works

rich in major and minor nutrients, proteins, and nitrogen. It gradually releases nutrients into the soil, feeding beneficial microbes, improving soil fertility, and supplying plant-available nutrition over time. This improves nutrient uptake, crop vigour, and soil health without burning plants. It can also be used in combination with chemical fertilizers for synergistic effects.
(Benefits expanded for clarity while staying close to the product page list)
Enhances soil fertility, organic carbon, and productivity.
Increases yield, quality, and produce shine.
Boosts soil aeration and water-holding capacity.
Inhibits nematodes, termites, and other pests.
Supports beneficial earthworm activity and soil biology.
Groundnut DOC is primarily used as an
organic fertilizer derived from groundnut de-oiled cake that enriches soil with nitrogen and other nutrients, promoting healthy vegetative growth and better crop yield
of cereals, pulses, vegetables, and oilseed crops.
improve soil fertility, microbial activity, and crop performance
Vegetables, fruits, flowers, cereals, millets, pulses, oilseeds, plantation crops and other field crops where nutrient-rich organic manure is desired.
(General crop usage based on typical oilcake manure applications.)
Groundnut DOC and mix into soil at the time of sowing/planting.
for enhanced nutrient uptake and synergistic nutrition.

What it is & How it works
made from the crushed seeds of the medicinal
. It supplies essential macro- and micronutrients and, when applied to soil, releases them over time to support plant nutrition and soil biology. Being botanical, it also offers
natural pest-repellent action and protection against nematodes and similar soil pests
NPK plus calcium, magnesium, sulphur, and micronutrients
Improves soil texture, pH balance, oxygen level, and nutrient status
Increases humus content and water-holding capacity
physical, chemical, and biological soil properties
Improves yield and quality of produce
Karanj Cake is primarily used as an
organic fertilizer that supplies nitrogen and other nutrients from Karanj seed residues, enhancing soil fertility, plant growth, and overall crop productivity
of cereals, pulses, vegetables, and oilseed crops.
improve soil microbial activity, nutrient availability, and crop yield
Cereals, millets, pulses, oilseeds, fibre crops, sugar crops, forage crops, plantation crops, vegetables, fruits, spices, flowers, medicinal and aromatic crops, orchards, and ornamentals.
of Karanj Cake and mix into the soil at the time of sowing or planting.

(Data as provided in the official product listing)
What it is & How it works
Castor Cake is made by crushing castor seeds to extract oil under controlled temperature using steam. It’s a
enriched with NPK and essential micronutrients like manganese, zinc, and copper, making it a
. As a slow-release organic nutrient source, it feeds beneficial soil microorganisms, strengthens root systems, and enhances soil fertility without harming plants.
soil aeration, fertility, and water-holding capacity
Boosts beneficial microbial activity and earthworm growth
Protects plants from nematodes and termites
fruit shine, quality, and sugar content
Castor Cake is primarily used as an
organic fertilizer that provides nitrogen and other essential nutrients from castor seed residues, improving soil fertility, plant growth, and overall crop yield naturally
of cereals, pulses, vegetables, and oilseeds.
boost soil fertility, microbial activity, and crop performance

for synergistic effect in soil application.
What it is & How it works
nutrient-rich organic manure produced from decomposed urban wastes

such as market waste, kitchen waste, and municipal solid waste. It supplies organic carbon and plant nutrients to soil, enhances microbial activity, and improves soil physical, chemical, and biological properties for stronger, healthier crop growth. (
of soil for improved fertility and structure. (
, leading to better plant growth and crop yield. (

Ideal for field crops, vegetables, fruits, plantation crops, landscaping, and horticulture.
What it is & How it works

made from biodegradable plant-origin substances through a controlled accelerated microbial composting process. It is free from unwanted bacteria, insect eggs, plant pathogens, and weed seeds, and improves soil health and structure while feeding plants with humus, organic matter, and nutrients.
Extremely useful during all stages of plant growth.
, creating favourable conditions for plant development.
humus, organic matter, beneficial microbes, and major/secondary/micro nutrients
by improving soil structure and aeration.

What it is & How it works
produced by co-composting high-grade rock phosphate in very fine size. It acts as a

, improving soil phosphorus availability in a form plants can absorb, enhancing root development and overall crop growth. It also improves soil physical and biological properties and reduces reliance on conventional phosphatic fertilisers.
organic alternative to diammonium phosphate and single super phosphate

, reducing damage from soil acidity or alkalinity.

PROM is superior to plain Rock Phosphate because the organic base enhances phosphorus availability and soil health simultaneously.

, where earthworms decompose vegetable and food wastes along with bedding materials, producing
— a rich organic manure. It contains water-soluble nutrients and beneficial microbes that improve soil structure, nutrient cycling, and plant growth.

rich in NPK and micronutrients as well as
— a natural pesticidal compound. It improves soil structure and fertility while simultaneously providing pest and disease management benefits in a natural way.

such as termites, white grubs, and mealy bugs using neem’s natural azadirachtin.
soil extract after soaking can be used as a spray.

Rock Phosphate- Phosphorus Rooth Strength Developer
What it is & How it works
mined natural mineral rich in phosphorus and calcium

. Its nutrients are gradually made available in the soil throughout the growing season, helping meet plants’ phosphorus needs — essential for root formation, energy transfer, seed and fruit development, and overall growth. It also supplies trace elements and gradually improves soil structure and fertility.
(Expanded slightly while keeping practical and clear.)
, essential for strong roots and reproductive growth.
throughout the season for sustained crop nutrition.
energy transfer, flowering, and fruit development
along with phosphorus for balanced nutrition.

natural phosphorus-rich fertilizer that slowly releases phosphorus to improve root development, flowering, and overall crop growth
to enhance nutrient availability over time.
early growth and root establishment stages
boost flowering, fruiting, and overall crop productivity naturally
vegetables, fruits, cereals, pulses, and plantation crops

Phosphorus is critical for root growth, energy transfer (ATP), flowering and early crop establishment.
Phosphorus gets fixed in soil (especially alkaline soils)
Even when phosphorus is present, much of it becomes chemically locked and unavailable.
How Soil+ Rock Phosphate Fixes It
Provides a natural, slow-release phosphorus source
Improves root development and early plant vigor
Ideal for basal application and organic farming systems
Gypsum- Calcium and Sulphur Soil Conditioner
Essential secondary nutrients released from gypsum (calcium sulfate)
(Specific numerical analysis not listed on the official page itself, but Ca & S are the main nutrient elements gypsum provides.)
What it is & How it works
sodic soil reclamation and sulphur fertilization
. When applied to soil, it forms calcium-rich soil particles that
exchange with sodium ions in sodic soils
, helping leach sodium away with irrigation or rain. In sulphur-deficient soils, gypsum supplies plant-available
, supporting essential metabolic functions. Gypsum does
not significantly change soil pH in non-sodic soils
but improves soil structure and nutrient mobility when properly incorporated and leached into the root zone.
by improving structure and promoting soil aggregation (improves particle flocculation). (
by replacing sodium ions with calcium, enabling leaching of harmful salts.
that support plant growth and metabolism. (
, especially under stress conditions like drought or salinity. (
in clay and compacted soils, reducing crust formation. (
Gypsum is primarily used as a
soil amendment that improves soil structure, supplies calcium and sulfur, and enhances root development and crop quality
to improve soil texture and reduce salinity.
enhance nutrient uptake, plant vigor, and crop quality naturally
vegetables, fruits, cereals, pulses, and plantation crops
Suitable for all crop types — cereals, millets, pulses, oilseeds, vegetables, fruits, flowers, and plantation crops. Gypsum is particularly beneficial in
and in crops responsive to calcium and sulphur nutrition. (
Apply based on soil pH and salinity; for example:
(Example gypsum rates to lower pH; actual requirement varies by soil and crop).
Broadcast gypsum on the soil surface before sowing/planting, then incorporate and irrigate to help gypsum move into the root zone.
to leach sodium salts and gypsum into deeper soil.
Mineral soil amendment — powdered gypsum (calcium sulfate).
(sizes typically issued per supplier; official page does not list explicit pack sizes).
Blossom end rot in tomato & chilli
cell wall strength and structural stability
Why Does Ca & S Deficiency Occur?
High sodium content affecting calcium availability
Over time, soil structure weakens and nutrient uptake efficiency declines.
Reduces soil sodicity (helps reclaim alkali soils)
Supports better fruit quality and shelf life
Ideal for vegetables, fruits, groundnut, onion, garlic, sugarcane, and field crops.
What it is & How it works
that activates flowering hormones and improves nutrient flow to reproductive tissues. Cytokinin promotes flower initiation, while Boron ensures proper pollen viability and fertilization.
Bloom Force- Flowering and Fruit Set Booster
What it is & How it works
fruit set and early fruit development
. Auxin ensures fruit retention, calcium strengthens cell walls, and potassium supports translocation of sugars, leading to higher fruit survival and early fruit growth.
Fruit retention and early fruit development protector
What it is & How it works
that focuses on converting yield into marketable quality. Potassium improves sugar movement, calcium strengthens fruit structure, and cytokinin supports uniform size development.
Fruit size, firmness and quality enhancer
As per crop and stage requirement

What it is & How it works
natural organic fertilizer made from finely and coarsely ground animal bones and slaughter-house waste that have been steamed to sterilise them
slow-release source of phosphorus and protein

that encourages strong root growth, flower production, and fruiting. It also supports soil microbial activity and makes phosphorus more available to plants by transforming less soluble forms to plant-usable forms.
to support healthy root development and energy transfer.
— feeds soil for months after application.
Reduces yield reduction from repeated cultivation and soil acidification.

organic phosphorus-rich fertilizer that promotes strong root development, flowering, and overall plant growth

🧠 What it is & How it works
👉 Potassium Humate is a naturally derived organic compound extracted from leonardite (rich humic substances).
Soil becomes more fertile and roots absorb nutrients better
Ultimate Soil Conditioner for Long-Term Fertility & Root Strength
After heavy fertilizer use (to restore soil health)
🧠 What it is & How it works
Chelated Mix Micronutrient is a balanced blend of essential micronutrients such as Zinc (Zn), Iron (Fe), Manganese (Mn), Copper (Cu), and Magnesium (Mg).
Chelation protects nutrients from getting locked in the soil, ensuring better stability and higher absorption by plants.
This results in faster correction of deficiencies and improved nutrient efficiency.
Corrects multiple micronutrient deficiencies in one application
Supports better flowering and fruit development
Complete micronutrient solution for balanced crop nutrition.
At first sign of deficiency symptoms
Fruits (Mango, Banana, Grapes), Vegetables (Tomato, Chilli, Brinjal), Field Crops (Wheat, Rice, Cotton), Cash Crops (Sugarcane, Tea). Suitable for all crops.
Foliar Spray: 1–2 gm per litre of water
Drip Irrigation: 500 gm – 1 kg per acre
Continuous use of only NPK fertilizers
High soil pH causing nutrient lock
Soil+ Chelated Mix Micronutrient provides a complete set of essential micronutrients in a highly absorbable form, ensuring quick correction of deficiencies and restoring balanced plant nutrition.
Amino based, Glycine based, and EDTA based formulations.
🧠 What it is & How it works
Zinc (Zn 12%) is a chelated micronutrient that provides zinc in a highly available and easily absorbable form.
Chelation prevents zinc from getting fixed in the soil, allowing the plant to absorb it efficiently through leaves and roots.
It plays a critical role in enzyme activation and growth regulation.
Promotes healthy plant growth and development
Enhances enzyme activity and metabolic functions
Supports better flowering and fruit setting
Fast and effective correction of zinc deficiency in crops.
At first signs of yellowing between leaf veins
Fruits (Mango, Citrus, Banana), Vegetables (Tomato, Onion, Chilli), Field Crops (Wheat, Rice, Maize), Oilseeds and Pulses.
Foliar Spray: 0.5–1 gm per litre of water
Soil+ Zinc Chelated provides readily available zinc in a protected form, ensuring quick absorption and immediate correction of deficiency symptoms, leading to improved growth and yield.
Amino based, Glycine based, and EDTA based formulations.
🧠 What it is & How it works
Iron (Fe 12%) is a chelated micronutrient that supplies iron in a stable and plant-available form.
Chelation prevents iron from getting locked in the soil, especially in alkaline conditions, allowing efficient absorption by plants.
Iron is essential for chlorophyll formation and energy transfer within the plant.
Promotes chlorophyll formation and green foliage
Rapid correction of iron deficiency and restoration of green leaf color.
At early stages of chlorosis (yellowing of young leaves)
In high pH or alkaline soils
When plants show pale or yellow top leaves
Fruits (Grapes, Citrus, Pomegranate), Vegetables (Spinach, Tomato, Potato), Field Crops (Soybean, Groundnut, Rice), Plantation crops.
Foliar Spray: 0.5–1 gm per litre of water
Drip Irrigation: 500 gm – 1 kg per acre
Soil+ Iron Chelated delivers iron in a protected and readily absorbable form, ensuring quick correction of chlorosis and restoring healthy green growth.
Amino based, Glycine based, and EDTA based formulations.
🧠 What it is & How it works
Manganese (Mn 12%) is a chelated micronutrient that provides manganese in a stable and plant-available form.
Chelation prevents manganese from getting fixed in the soil, ensuring efficient absorption by plants.
Manganese plays a key role in photosynthesis and enzyme activation.
Effective correction of manganese deficiency for improved photosynthesis.
At signs of interveinal yellowing in young leaves
Fruits (Citrus, Grapes), Vegetables (Beans, Potato, Tomato), Field Crops (Wheat, Soybean, Rice), Plantation crops.
Foliar Spray: 0.5–1 gm per litre of water
Sandy or low organic matter soils
Excess iron or other nutrient imbalance
Soil+ Manganese Chelated provides manganese in an easily absorbable form, ensuring quick correction of deficiency and improved plant metabolic activity.
Amino based, Glycine based, and EDTA based formulations.
🧠 What it is & How it works
Copper (Cu 12%) is a chelated micronutrient that provides copper in a stable and plant-available form.
Chelation prevents copper from getting fixed in the soil, ensuring efficient absorption by plants.
Copper plays a vital role in enzyme systems and supports plant defense mechanisms.
Enhances natural plant defense and resilience
Supports enzyme activation and metabolic processes
Improves overall plant strength and structure
Supports plant health and strengthens natural resistance.
At signs of leaf distortion or dieback
Fruits (Citrus, Grapes), Vegetables (Onion, Tomato), Field Crops (Wheat, Rice), Plantation crops.
Foliar Spray: 0.5–1 gm per litre of water
Sandy soils with low organic matter
Soil+ Copper Chelated delivers copper in a protected and readily absorbable form, helping restore plant health, improve resistance, and correct deficiency quickly.
Amino based, Glycine based, and EDTA based formulations.
🧠 What it is & How it works
Magnesium (Mg 6%) is a chelated micronutrient that provides magnesium in a stable and plant-available form.
Chelation prevents magnesium from getting fixed in the soil, ensuring efficient absorption by plants.
Magnesium is a central component of chlorophyll and is essential for photosynthesis and energy transfer.
Essential for chlorophyll formation and green leaves
Enhances energy transfer within the plant
Supports overall plant growth and vigor
Restores chlorophyll and improves photosynthesis efficiency.
At signs of yellowing in older leaves
Fruits (Banana, Grapes, Citrus), Vegetables (Tomato, Potato, Leafy crops), Field Crops (Maize, Wheat, Sugarcane), Plantation crops.
Foliar Spray: 1–2 gm per litre of water
Drip Irrigation: 500 gm – 1 kg per acre
High potassium or calcium levels (nutrient imbalance)
Soil+ Magnesium Chelated provides magnesium in a readily available form, ensuring quick absorption and restoring chlorophyll production and plant energy processes.
Amino based, Glycine based, and EDTA based formulations.
🧠 What it is & How it works
Calcium (Ca 10%) is a chelated micronutrient that provides calcium in a stable and plant-available form.
Chelation prevents calcium from reacting with other elements in the soil, ensuring better absorption by plants.
Calcium is essential for cell wall formation and overall structural strength of the plant.
Strengthens cell walls and plant structure
Enhances fruit firmness and shelf life
Improves plant strength and enhances fruit quality and shelf life.
At pre-flowering and fruit development stages
When signs of fruit disorders appear
Fruits (Apple, Grapes, Pomegranate), Vegetables (Tomato, Chilli, Capsicum), Field Crops, Plantation crops.
Foliar Spray: 1–2 gm per litre of water
Drip Irrigation: 500 gm – 1 kg per acre
Poor fruit quality and shelf life
Soil+ Calcium Chelated delivers calcium in an easily absorbable form, ensuring proper cell development, reducing disorders, and improving crop quality.
Amino based, Glycine based, and EDTA based formulations.
What it is & How it works
Calcium + Boron + Magnesium is a chelated micronutrient combination that provides three essential nutrients in a stable and plant-available form.
Chelation ensures better absorption and prevents nutrient lock in the soil.
Calcium supports cell structure, boron aids in flowering and fruit setting, and magnesium plays a key role in chlorophyll formation and energy transfer.
Strengthens plant structure and cell walls
Triple-action solution for flowering, plant strength, and photosynthesis.
At signs of multiple micronutrient deficiencies
Fruits (Grapes, Pomegranate, Banana), Vegetables (Tomato, Chilli, Cucurbits), Field Crops, Plantation crops.
Foliar Spray: 1–2 gm per litre of water
Drip Irrigation: 500 gm – 1 kg per acre
Soil+ Calcium + Boron + Magnesium Chelated provides all three nutrients in an easily absorbable form, ensuring improved flowering, stronger plants, better photosynthesis, and enhanced crop quality.
Amino based, Glycine based, and EDTA based formulations.
🧠 What it is & How it works
Potassium Phosphite is a highly soluble nutrient derived from phosphorous acid, supplying phosphorus in the form of phosphite along with potassium.
It is rapidly absorbed by the plant and moves systemically through both xylem and phloem.
It works by enhancing plant metabolism and activating natural defense mechanisms, helping plants respond better to stress conditions.
Enhances plant immunity and stress tolerance
Promotes strong root and shoot development
Supports faster plant recovery under stress
Provides quick plant response due to high mobility
Fast-acting plant performance enhancer for stress resistance and plant health.
During stress conditions (drought, heat, disease pressure)
When quick plant recovery is required
Fruits (Grapes, Citrus, Banana), Vegetables (Tomato, Potato, Chilli), Field Crops (Rice, Wheat), Plantation crops.
Foliar Spray: 2–3 ml per litre of water
Soil+ Potassium Phosphite enhances internal plant strength by improving nutrient movement and activating natural defense responses, helping plants perform better under stress and recover faster.
🧠 What it is & How it works
Mono Ammonium Phosphate is a fully water-soluble fertilizer that provides nitrogen and a high concentration of phosphorus.
It dissolves completely in water and is readily absorbed by plants, making phosphorus immediately available for root development and early growth.
Enhances energy transfer within the plant
High phosphorus fertilizer for strong root development and early growth.
Fruits, vegetables, field crops, plantation crops. Suitable for all crops, especially during early growth stages.
Foliar Spray: 1–2 gm per litre of water
Fixation of phosphorus in alkaline soils
Soil+ MAP provides readily available phosphorus and nitrogen in a highly soluble form, ensuring quick root development and strong early plant growth.
100% Water Soluble, Polyphosphate base variants available.
🧠 What it is & How it works
Mono Potassium Phosphate is a fully water-soluble fertilizer that provides high levels of phosphorus and potassium.
It dissolves completely in water and is quickly absorbed by plants, supporting flowering, fruit development, and energy transfer.
Promotes strong flowering and fruit setting
High phosphorus and potassium fertilizer for flowering and fruit development.
When higher energy demand is required
Fruits, vegetables, field crops, plantation crops. Suitable for all crops during reproductive stages.
Foliar Spray: 1–2 gm per litre of water
Low phosphorus and potassium levels in soil
High crop demand during flowering stage
Soil+ MKP provides readily available phosphorus and potassium, ensuring better flowering, improved fruit setting, and enhanced crop quality.
🧠 What it is & How it works
Potassium Sulphate is a fully water-soluble fertilizer that provides a high concentration of potassium.
It dissolves easily in water and is rapidly absorbed by plants, supporting fruit development, quality improvement, and overall plant strength.
Improves fruit size, color, and taste
Enhances crop quality and shelf life
High potassium fertilizer for improving crop quality, size, and yield.
Fruits (Banana, Grapes, Citrus), Vegetables (Potato, Tomato, Onion), Field Crops, Plantation crops.
Foliar Spray: 1–2 gm per litre of water
High crop demand during fruiting stage
Soil+ Potassium Sulphate provides readily available potassium, improving fruit quality, enhancing plant strength, and supporting better yield.
🧠 What it is & How it works
NPK 19-19-19 is a fully water-soluble balanced fertilizer that provides equal proportions of nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium.
It dissolves completely in water and is quickly absorbed by plants, ensuring uniform supply of all major nutrients required for overall growth and development.
Provides balanced nutrition for all growth stages
Promotes uniform plant growth and development
Enhances root, shoot, and leaf growth
Improves overall crop health and yield
Complete balanced fertilizer for overall plant growth and development.
Fruits, vegetables, field crops, plantation crops. Suitable for all crops at various growth stages.
Foliar Spray: 1–2 gm per litre of water
Soil+ NPK 19:19:19 provides a balanced supply of all essential macronutrients, ensuring uniform growth, better plant health, and improved yield.
